2297310.name: SuperCold Demo
2297310.description:
SUPERCOLD DEMO

Check out our demo and add the game to your wishlist if you like what you see in the prototype! In the demo, you can fight against different waves of enemies with a bow or a sword, or anything else you can get your hands on. There are two different environments for you to figure out the most creative way to defeat your opponents.

GAMEPLAY

Supercold is an immersive VR game with thrilling combat where time only moves when you move. The game features realistic physics and graphics where you can eliminate your opponents in countless ways, but beware because they can do the same to you! The game uses DLSS and FSR upscaling technologies to achieve such visual fidelity with affordable system requirements.

THE FUTURE

The current stage is just the tip of the iceberg. We plan to add more combat scenarios/puzzles, endless mode, maps, weapons, enemy types, and much more in the future so keep an eye out for updates!
